state_refinement.note: MCP introduces only a transient confirmation prompt / WorkspaceBindingProposal flow. The daemon owns validation, materialization, and the durable LocalWorkspaceBinding lifecycle; MCP persists no state and adds no new durable lifecycle state.
state_refinement.smallest_honest_release_state: n/a — no durable state added by this client change
invariants: MCP never binds silently: no workspace.bind request is dispatched without confirmed=true.
The cwd/workspace root is candidate path evidence only, never project identity.
MCP does not persist LocalWorkspaceBinding; it only proposes with source_surface=mcp.
state_refinement.minimization_review: Canonical state, authority, and persistence semantics did not change; the client remains a transport surface that proposes and renders daemon verdicts verbatim.
